theme_notes: Touchstones: US-Iran war tab hits $29 billion (day 74, peace talks stalled); Trump lands in Beijing for high-stakes summit with Xi (trade, Taiwan, Iran all on table); hantavirus cruise ship outbreak hits 11 cases, French woman on artificial lung; Victor Wembanyama drops 27/17/3 as Spurs take 3-2 series lead over Timberwolves; 70% of Americans now expect a recession.
settled: Cleaner than the Trump-Xi communiqué. You two actually agreed on something.
Zero balance. Even the Iran ceasefire didn't last this long.
You're even. Rarer than a cruise ship without hantavirus.
youOwe: Less than a souvenir from a hantavirus cruise. Barely.
Under $50. Trump spent more on his flight to Beijing than you owe.
Pocket change. Wembanyama earns this every 0.3 seconds.
Enough for a seat on the cruise ship that had the hantavirus. Cheap, but brave.
A rounding error in the Iran war budget. You're basically a line item.
More than a Jeopardy! wrong-answer penalty. Less than your excuses.
The US-Iran war costs $400M per day. You're not pulling your weight.
Your debt is now a recession indicator. The CNN poll agrees.
Wembanyama makes this in 45 seconds. It's fine. You're fine.
Almost four figures. The Pentagon briefs Congress about less.
Enough to buy a Beijing hotel room during the Trump-Xi summit. Scalped.
Seven in ten Americans fear a recession. You're the reason.
The Iran war costs $29 billion. You're personally responsible for 0.003% of it.
At this level, your debt has a spokesperson and a press conference.
You triggered an internal ceasefire proposal. It was rejected.
The US spent $29B fighting Iran. You spent more per square foot of your lifestyle.
This isn't a balance. It's a treaty obligation.
At this point Wembanyama could buy you outright, and he's 22.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a cruise cocktail. Pre-hantavirus prices.
Practically nothing. Like the Iran ceasefire — technically exists.
Under $50 in your favor. Invest wisely. The 70% recession crowd says hurry.
They owe you enough for a Spurs playoff nosebleed. They can't even afford that.
Inching your way. Slower than the Trump-Xi trade deal.
They owe you about what one page of the Iran war briefing costs to print.
That's a round of drinks at the Trump-Xi Beijing summit bar. Your treat, apparently.
Your partner is a recession all on their own.
Wembanyama pulls this down per second. They have not.
At $29B per day, the US war machine is more financially responsible than they are.
Four figures incoming. The IMF has better repayment timelines.
They'd need a Jeopardy! winning streak just to cover this. No lifelines.
You are their central bank. Set interest rates accordingly.
The hantavirus task force assembled faster than they've moved on this debt.
The Trump-Xi summit agenda is shorter than your grievances at this amount.
Five grand plus. This isn't a relationship — it's a bilateral debt negotiation.
You are owed more than several NATO members' defense contributions.
Xi showed up to Beijing. Your partner still hasn't shown up with a Venmo.
